name: Sauerbraten Klopse (Sauerbraten Meatballs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix beef, milk, bread crumbs, cloves, allspice, salt and pepper.
Form into meatballs.
2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
3. Brown meatballs until golden brown on all sides. Remove from the pan and set aside.
4. Add 1 cup water, vinegar, ginger, bay leaf, and brown sugar to the pan.
5. Stir in flour with 2 tablespoons water to create a gravy.
6. Return meatballs to the pan and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. Skim off any excess fat from the sauce.
8. Serve hot with buttered noodles on the side.
